name: Annotated Metallic Alloys Microstructures (AMAM)
overview: AMAM benchmark dataset website served entirely from local repository assets (no Drive dependencies).

method.workflowSummary: Experts partially label representative regions, an ad-hoc U-Net predicts full-image labels, and iterative review/refinement continues until acceptable quality is reached.
steps: Select representative micrographs for each material condition.
Create partial labels for key regions and phases.
Train a segmentation model to predict unlabeled regions.
Review predictions, add corrective labels, and iterate.
Finalize full-image labels for benchmark release.

localDataNote: Only categories with both root images and a detected label/mask subfolder are included.

subsets.description: Ferrite and pearlite morphology with clear phase contrast.
subsets.annotationNotes: Ferrite is labeled in blue and pearlite in red. Some pores/scratches can be confused with pearlite.

gallery.notes: Paired from local filenames by index/magnification heuristics.

subsets.description: Large ferrite dendrites with an interdendritic region rich in ferrite and graphite flakes.
subsets.annotationNotes: Dendrites are highlighted in red and interdendritic area in blue. Some low-graphite regions may be misannotated.

gallery.notes: Paired from local filenames by index/magnification heuristics.

subsets.description: High-magnification view resolves ferrite matrix and graphite flakes.
subsets.annotationNotes: Thin graphite flakes increase annotation difficulty and may require near pixel-level labeling.

gallery.notes: Paired from local filenames by index/magnification heuristics.

subsets.description: Etched to reveal pre-austenite grains with challenging blurry grain boundaries.
subsets.annotationNotes: Dendrites are marked in red and interdendritic areas in blue; boundary blur can produce small local errors.

gallery.notes: Paired from local filenames by index/magnification heuristics.

subsets.description: Sintered ferrite particles with subtle contrast between grains and intergranular regions.
subsets.annotationNotes: Good overall annotation quality after iterative training, with occasional difficult regions.

gallery.notes: Paired from local filenames by index/magnification heuristics.

subsets.description: Higher magnification of printed ferritic morphology; includes more difficult local annotation regions.
subsets.annotationNotes: Some samples remain challenging and can exhibit incomplete segmentation in local areas.

gallery.notes: Paired from local filenames by index/magnification heuristics.
